supply_chain.dependencies: Approximately 88% of hardware is manufactured in Taiwan. Proprietary ASICs are built by contract manufacturers using foundries in Taiwan and Japan operated by TSMC or the contract manufacturer itself. Some key components (CPUs, network chips, memory devices) are available from limited or sole sources of supply.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain constraints, component shortages (chips), long or uncertain lead times, supply disruptions due to natural disasters, pandemics, geopolitical tensions (war in Ukraine, tensions between China and Taiwan), international trade disputes, tariffs, labor disruptions, power outages, critical infrastructure attacks. Concentration risk in Taiwan for manufacturing. Single-source or limited-source suppliers for certain components.

regulatory_risks: GDPR compliance and data handling requirements in the EU
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and other state privacy laws
Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) in the EU
EU RoHS Directive and similar laws on hazardous substances
EU REACH Regulation on chemicals
EU Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment Directive (WEEE)
EU Circular Economy Action Plan and SCIP database requirements
U.S. export controls and economic sanctions
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act
United Kingdom Bribery Act 2010
Dodd-Frank conflict minerals disclosure requirements
FedRAMP certification requirements for U.S. government sales
SEC cybersecurity risk management and disclosure rules
BEPS Pillar Two global minimum tax framework
Changes in tax laws and regulations (U.S. and international)
Import and export regulations, tariffs, trade barriers
Environmental laws and regulations
Employment and labor laws
Product safety and labeling laws
Consumer protection laws
Anti-bribery laws
Government procurement regulations and clearance requirements

sanction_risks: U.S. sanctions against Russia and Belarus
U.S. embargoed or sanctioned countries, governments and persons
Risk of products being shipped to U.S. sanctions targets by channel partners
